heading: Effectiveness of Convention
label: 290k–10 Effectiveness of Convention
text: Articles 43 through 48, inclusive, of the Convention shall have full force and effect in the United States, its territories and possessions, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, upon the entry into force of the Convention for the United States.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 413 of title IV of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Dec. 11, 1987Pub. L. 100–202
